name: RLM Workflow
description: Repo-Document Workflow (RLM) with strict phase gates, artifact locking, TDD discipline, and systematic debugging for disciplined software development
author: doubleuuser

skills.name: rlm-workflow
skills.description: Execute RLM (Repo-Document Workflow) end-to-end with strict phase gates, artifact locking, addenda, traceability, and single-command auto-resume behavior. Use when a request mentions 'Implement requirement run-id', asks to run a specific RLM phase, requires creating or updating files in .codex/rlm/run-id/, or asks to continue a paused run after manual QA.

skills.name: rlm-tdd
skills.description: Use when implementing any code in RLM Phase 4. Enforces strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline with The Iron Law - no production code without a failing test first.

skills.name: rlm-debugging
skills.description: Use when RLM requirement involves debugging a bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior. Insert Phase 2b between Phase 2 and Phase 3 to perform systematic root cause analysis before attempting any fixes.

commands.name: rlm-init
commands.description: Initialize a new RLM run with requirements template

commands.name: rlm-status
commands.description: Check status of current RLM run
